seeds.label: Village to Union Square
seeds.description: Prefer building shade along the complete walk.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square using the most building shade.

seeds.missionText: Find a shaded walk from McCarren Park to Cooper Park.

seeds.label: Tompkins to Union

seeds.missionText: Avoid direct sun between Tompkins Square Park and Union Square.

seeds.label: Hot-day crosstown

seeds.missionText: Take the shadier route from Washington Square Park to Tompkins Square Park.
